events.event_description: U.S. Embassy established in the Federation of Mali (Dakar), with Donald Albert Dumont as first Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Donald Albert Dumont, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Appointed: 1960-06-20. Note: Embassy Dakar (in the Federation of Mali) was established on June 20, 1960.
